zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry de Heton於1224年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾迪恩 白 阿爾坦時，他的父親Richard de Heaton40歲，母親Lady de Heaton35歲。他於1257年之前與Henrietta De Heaton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世在英國格盧斯特斯爾也福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry de Heton于1224年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾迪恩 白 阿爾坦时，他的父亲Richard de Heaton40岁，母亲Lady de Heaton35岁。他于1257年之前与Henrietta De Heaton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世在英国格盧斯特斯爾也福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Heton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Midlothian) and English: variant of   Seaton  .

variants.name: Seaton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Seaton, such as those in Cumberland, Devon, Durham, Leicestershire, Northumberland, Rutland, East Yorkshire, and North Yorkshire, most of which derive from Old English sǣ ‘sea, lake’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, though the Leicestershire placename probably arises from an Old English personal name Sǣga or a stream-name Sǣge (from Old English sǣge ‘slow moving’; compare Seabrook ) + Old English tūn.
Scottish: habitational name from Seton (East Lothian), from Old English sǣ ‘sea’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry de Heton was born in 1224, in Dean by Altham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard de Heaton, was 40 and his mother, Lady de Heaton, was 35. He married Henrietta De Heaton before 1257. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in Ryeford, Gloucestershire, England.

Il a épousé Henrietta De Heaton avant 1257. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé à Ryeford, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

Er hat vor 1257 Henrietta De Heaton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb in Ryeford, Gloucestershire, England.

ko.Dean By Altham, Lancashire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 디 비 알섬
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry de Heton(이)가 1224년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 디 비 알섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Heaton(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady de Heaton(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1257년 이전 Henrietta De Heaton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 그루스스터실르 리퍼드에서 사망했다.
